title: The Defender: Farm and Castle
description:
You are an archer tasked with defending a castle from invading monsters. Inside the castle, you can manage resources and harvest crops, gather experience points to level up, and learn new skills and abilities to face stronger enemies.

The Defender: Farm and Castle is an easy-to-play game suitable for everyone. It was developed with a blend of castle defense and shooting game concepts, and we’ve added ally characters to make the gameplay even more enjoyable.
description_short: You are an archer tasked with defending a castle from invading monsters. Inside the castle, you can manage resources and harvest crops, gather experience points to level up, and learn new skills and abilities to face stronger enemies.
